content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.07% with IT imploding -5.22%, VIX +4.79% at 19.48 — risk-off day. Book already at 68% deployed, cash buffer just above minimum. Focus is position management, not new adds, especially late in session (14:43) with only 46 min left.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -5.6% but CMP 76.87 well above SL 74.50. Q4 print was exceptional (+34.9% PAT, NIM 3.95%, NNPA 0.13%) — thesis intact, this is post-result profit-taking. SL at 74.50 (~3% below CMP) is appropriate; do not tighten into volatility as it would likely get stopped on noise. Hold to SL or thesis break."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1013.22,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op — current SL 1013.22 already at breakeven-plus (+3% from entry 984). P&L +4.7%, thesis fully intact post AAA upgrade and GNPA <1%. Keeping target 1100 (MOFSL PT 1143). No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, -0.8% drag immaterial. Gold thesis (geopolitical, INR weak, FII outflows) intact. SL 119 is appropriate for gold ETF volatility. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1410.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op request — SL 1410 already at near-breakeven (entry 1412.94, CMP 1425). P&L only +0.9% so trailing SL mandate (+2% threshold) not triggered yet. Thesis intact: Q4 beat, Citi PT 1675, Nuvama 1640. Hold current SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.05,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 3,
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.8%, close to +2% trail trigger. SL already at entry (1049). Raising to exact entry 1049.05 to ensure no-loss even on tick-by-tick. CRITICAL: Q4 results Apr 27 (Monday) — binary event risk. Stock trades WELL ABOVE consensus PT (Rs 600-720), P/E 30. Any miss = sharp correction. Tight SL at breakeven is right discipline; I will re-evaluate pre-result on Monday."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 676.00,
      "new_target": 725.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.4%, stock at 52-wk high ahead of Apr 29 Q4 results. Tightening SL from 672 to 676 (below intraday low 682 by small margin) to reduce event risk. Stock trading at top of consensus PT band (Rs 587-687) — binary risk on earnings. Tight SL preserves the gain while giving room."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.1%, still well above SL 2260 (~2.3% buffer from CMP 2312). Q4 results Apr 30. FMCG defensive thesis valid but underperforming Nestle/COLPAL today. SL gives room for result; thesis reassessment post-Apr 30 print."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.7%, well above SL 393 (~2% buffer). Sector constructive, RE adds ongoing, Q4 results May 15. Hold current structure."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact post strong Q4; SL not breached. Do not tighten — needs room for post-result noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1013.22,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to breakeven-plus. Target 1100 within reach (MOFSL PT 1143)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, small drag, macro thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1410.00,
      "reasoning": "SL near breakeven already; not yet at +2% P&L trail trigger."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.05,
      "reasoning": "SL raised to exact entry ahead of Monday Apr 27 Q4 event risk. Stock extended vs consensus PT."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 676.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL ahead of Apr 29 Q4 earnings; stock at top of consensus PT band, limited cushion."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.00,
      "reasoning": "Buffer to SL adequate; Apr 30 results await."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 393.00,
      "reasoning": "Small drag, thesis intact, SL gives room."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "PNBHOUSING stronger setup (HFC breakout, AAA upgrade) — already held. GLENMARK (pharma, multiple US launches) and NESTLE/COLPAL FMCG leadership noted but portfolio is 68% deployed; not adding today given VIX +4.8%, IT collapse, and late-session timing. HSCL/CLEAN/ONESOURCE volume moves interesting but chasing into close on a risk-off day is the wrong playbook.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 68% deployed — within rule but close to 80% cap; remaining deployable Rs 124k. Per deployment hysteresis guidance: default disposition on a negative-breadth day with ~flat book P&L is NO_ACTION on new entries. Event risk cluster next week: AUBANK Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, HUL Apr 30. Three of eight positions face binary earnings catalysts in next 5 trading days — prudent to tighten SLs where possible (done on AUBANK/GRANULES) rather than add exposure. Sector check: Financials (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) ~27% of book — within 35% sector cap but at upper range of rate-sensitive financials cluster per guidance; no further financial adds today. FMCG (NESTLE + HUL) ~7% — room but not adding into weakness."
}
